long_description:
[API]-Unusual request latency for Regional Extension Server [FRA] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://test-runbook.com
TIP Situation:                      Observed Regional-extension-server pod request latency below 95% threshold (0.8s). issue in unusual-request-latency-for-regional-extension-server
TIP Short Description:              Monitors regional-extension-server pods and alerts if fewer than 95% of HTTP requests complete within 0.8s over 5 minutes
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-apis:eu-de::mzone2c7-zonelet01:pod:fra2-qz1-sr2-rk070-s13

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_bucket{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver",le="0.8"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) / sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_count{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) < 0.95 = 0.00
Segment:
    host_hostname = 'fra2-qz1-sr2-rk070-s13' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2c7-zonelet01' and kube_pod_name = 'genctl-extension-server-557998f8fd-s5grl'

Time:                12/09/2025 08:24 PM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [API]-Unusual request latency for Regional Extension Server [FRA]
Description:    Monitors regional-extension-server pods and alerts if fewer than 95% of HTTP requests complete within 0.8s over 5 minutes
Team:           is-apis
Scope:          
Alert When:     sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_bucket{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver",le="0.8"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) / sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_count{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) < 0.95
Duration:       20m
